test.name: FamilySearch wiki — probate and will records
test.description: User asks how to find probate or will records. Tests that the skill handles a legal-record how-to query.

input.user_message: Search the FamilySearch wiki for how to find probate or will records for a deceased ancestor

judge_context: Should call wiki_search with a query about finding probate or will records
Summary should explain what probate records contain and where they are held
No invented legal or genealogical details beyond what the wiki returned
